Philosophy: The offhand slot is a major identity-defining equipment slot. Equipment in this slot shapes active behavior and role emergence.

CanonicalRules.Text: Each vocation has strict allowed off-hand equipment defining build identity.
The game does not use traditional RPG attributes. Progression is skill-based and item-driven only.
Combat role output must be displayed as numeric performance vectors instead of categorical labels.
Equipment may modify extended combat parameters including offensive, defensive, elemental, and utility attributes, independently from class base stats.

defensive.Name: Defensive Offhand
defensive.GeneralEffect: Provides high physical mitigation and magic resistance.

offensive_physical.Name: Offensive Physical Offhand
offensive_physical.GeneralEffect: Increases movement speed and attack speed for physical dual-wield configurations.

offensive_magical.Name: Offensive Magical Offhand
offensive_magical.GeneralEffect: Amplifies magical damage, magic level, mana efficiency, and cooldown reduction.

utility.Name: Utility Offhand
utility.GeneralEffect: Exclusively for Archers. Amplifies movement speed, distance fighting, crit metrics, and attack speed.

ItemDetails.Name: Escudo de Batalha (Shield)
ItemDetails.Description: Solid defensive block device offering superior armor, magic resistance, and bonus HP.

ItemDetails.Name: Espada Companheira (Off-Hand Sword)
ItemDetails.Description: Companion blade for dual-wield strike velocity, adding critical strike chance and armor penetration.

ItemDetails.Name: Adaga de Mão Esquerda (Off-Hand Dagger)
ItemDetails.Description: Light off-hand blade optimizing fast positioning, high crit rate, and maximum swiftness.

ItemDetails.Name: Grimório Arcano (Spellbook)
ItemDetails.Description: Spellbooks provide magical level scaling, increased mana efficiency, and elemental spell damage.

ItemDetails.Name: Cetro Sagrado de Luz (Sacred Scepter)
ItemDetails.Description: Sacred scepters amplify holy damage, healing output, magic level, and reduce spell cooldowns.

ItemDetails.Name: Aljava de Flechas (Quiver)
ItemDetails.Description: Archer-exclusive utility offhand providing ammunition storage, high critical chance/damage, and distance fighting boosts.
